---
title: "Data Science Projects"
description: "A showcase of my R programming, data wrangling, and visualization work."
format: html
---

Here is a collection of my recent data science projects and reflection essays, highlighting my expertise in the R ecosystem.

::: {style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(300px, 1fr)); gap: 2rem; margin-top: 2rem;"}

::: {.glass-card}
### Intro to Data Science in R
Exploration of foundational data structures and functional programming paradigms in R.
[View Project (HTML)](assets/Kachroo,%20Asif-M02-Intro-Data-Science-in-R.html)
:::

::: {.glass-card}
### Data Visualization Principles
Applying `ggplot2` to create clear, aesthetic, and impactful visualizations from raw datasets.
[View Application (HTML)](assets/Kachroo,Asif%20M03-1-Data_Viz_Principle-3%20(2).html)
:::

::: {.glass-card}
### Advanced Data Visualization
A deep dive into advanced aesthetic mapping and chart layering techniques for complex data.
[View Reflection (HTML)](assets/Kachroo,Asif-M04-Reflection%20Essay-Advanced%20Data-Viz.html)
:::

::: {.glass-card}
### Data Wrangling (M06)
Transforming and reshaping unstructured data using the `dplyr` and `tidyr` packages.
[View Project (HTML)](assets/M06.html)
:::

::: {.glass-card}
### Intro to Functional Programming
Iterating over lists and datasets cleanly and efficiently using `purrr`.
[View Application (HTML)](assets/M11-2_%20Introduction%20to%20Functional%20Programming%20in%20R.html)
:::

::: {.glass-card}
### Advanced R Programming
Final reflection essay outlining my journey mastering functional programming, error handling, and robust data structures in R.
[View Reflection (HTML)](assets/M12%20Reflection%20Essay%20-%20Advanced%20R%20Programming.html)
:::

:::
